MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lauren M. Monson, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3856, for defendant and moving party;
Daniel Boreen, Tel. 415.564.1514, plaintiff and opposing party appearing on his own behalf.

The matter was argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Granted without leave to amend. The Second Amended Petition is barred in its entirety by the 90-day statute of limitations provided in Code of Civil Procedure 1094.6(b). Order signed in open Court.
